title: Strategic Objective Prioritization
summary: Determining which strategic objectives merit fleet commitment.
details: Not all objectives are worth the fleet. Evaluate: strategic value of objective, probability of success, expected losses, alternative approaches. Fleet preservation often outweighs tactical objectives. High-value objectives: enemy fleet destruction, critical infrastructure, irreplaceable assets. Low-value: territory that can be retaken, enemies that will retreat, symbolic targets. Choose battles wisely.
annotations: The fleet is a strategic asset - don't spend it on tactical gains.
Sometimes the best battle is the one you don't fight.
